character_designs.name_cn: 青翎鸦见多状态角色板
character_designs.identity: Individual Snowfeather crow scout from the Northern Beastfolk Alliance visual system
character_designs.story_scope_note: Visual asset only. This pass establishes a reusable named scout model without changing the season outline or committing new plot beats.

body_and_face.species_lock: Snowfeather crow beastfolk scout; recognizable corvid traits with a practical light-boned wall-climber body, not a generic human ranger and not a full monster bird.
body_and_face.scale: Adult or near-adult scout, slightly taller and much lighter than an average human; long arms, narrow torso, sinewy legs, and claw-capable hands and feet.
body_and_face.face: Sharp corvid face with black-grey feather crown, watchful black eyes, a subtle beak-line or beak-shaped nose bridge, short cheek feathers, and a pale old scar under the right eye or along the beak line. The face must be serious and production-readable, not cute, cartoonish, or masked human.
body_and_face.personal_anchor: A fixed low-saturation teal-green feather cluster on the left side of the head crown or left arm cape; this is personal plumage, not a symbol or badge.
body_and_face.posture: Back and shoulders often close to wall, head tilted as if listening to wind and rope tension, hands ready to hook or cut rather than pose heroically.

constant_anchors: pale scar under the right eye or along the right beak line
sharp corvid face and watchful black eyes
black-grey feather crown and short cheek feathers
bone message tube on the back or belt
three small bone rings on the right forearm
dark blood oath cord on left wrist or ankle
tiny physical bonewood oath knot or feather wood sliver only as a small object

state_designs.episode_range: border-to-north scout, messenger, and recurring Northern contact shots
state_designs.silhouette: Slim upright scout silhouette with folded feather arm cape, narrow waist tool belt, rope spool, bone hook, message tube, and light bracers.
state_designs.color_logic: Smoke feather black, frozen grey, bone white, wind-eroded brown, and dark hide dominate; teal appears only as the personal feather cluster; blue survival fire is absent or tiny.
state_designs.damage_level: Functional wear, snow dust, feather edge fray, small old scar; no ragged beggar look.
required_details: right-eye or beak-line pale scar visible
dark blood oath cord visible on left wrist or ankle
message tube visible but contains no text
no large emblem, crest, badge, or wing logo

state_designs.episode_range: wall climb, rope throw, gate-flag cutting, inner-latch sabotage, and Hanwubao exterior infiltration shots
state_designs.silhouette: Diagonal wall-climb silhouette with one arm extended by grappling hook, feather cape half-open for balance, clawed foot braced on blackstone, rope line controlling the composition.
state_designs.color_logic: Blackstone, smoke black, bone white, frozen grey, and small teal feather anchor; no large blue magic wing.
state_designs.damage_level: Wall scuffs, rope wear, blackstone dust, feather tip frost.
required_details: pose must read as climbing or rope-throwing, not flying
bone hook and rope must dominate the action
teal feather remains visible despite motion
claw wraps and light bracers remain readable

state_designs.episode_range: Hanwubao, blackstone snowline, scout withdrawal, covert message handoff, and cold exterior shots
state_designs.silhouette: More concealed cold-weather state with smoke-grey short scarf, snow-dusted feather mantle, covered fire pot, frozen rope coil, and message tube carried close to the back.
state_designs.color_logic: Border blackstone, snow white, shadow blue, smoke feather black, bone white, and a restrained teal personal note; covered fire has only a tiny blue survival glow.
state_designs.damage_level: Cold wear and snow dust only; clothing remains complete and useful.
required_details: same teal feather cluster and right-eye scar must remain identifiable
message tube and covered fire pot are visible
winter layer must not become Luming-style noble fur or shaman robe
no large banner, crest, or readable message

detail_panels.purpose: Lock Qingling Yajian as a named crow scout rather than a generic Snowfeather unit.
detail_panels.notes: Sharp corvid face, black eyes, black-grey feather crown, left-side teal feather cluster, pale old scar under the right eye or along beak line.

detail_panels.purpose: Show short-wing balance tool without turning the character into a flying hero or angelic figure.
detail_panels.notes: Dark feather-pattern arm cape can fold as a short cloak or half-open as a balance membrane; feather tips worn and snow-dusted.
Bone grappling hook with old iron tip, thin rawhide rope spool, knots, hook wear, and blackstone scratches.

detail_panels.purpose: Preserve light scout construction and climbing anatomy.
detail_panels.notes: Light bone forearm bracers, clawed hands and feet, leather wraps, scuffed blackstone contact points.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock sabotage tools as physical props.
detail_panels.notes: Short knife, narrow flag-cutting blade, covered small fire pot with only tiny survival glow.

detail_panels.purpose: Separate messenger function from generic wall-climber.
detail_panels.notes: Small bone message tube sealed with leather, dark blood oath cord on left wrist or ankle, no readable text.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry faction continuity without creating a new badge.
detail_panels.notes: Tiny bonewood oath knot, rope charm, or feather wood sliver partially hidden by tool cords; no large emblem.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry project material and color continuity.
detail_panels.notes: Smoke feather black, frozen earth grey, bone white, wind-eroded brown, dark hide, old iron, dark blood red, low-saturation teal feather, tiny blue survival fire, blackstone snow dust.

negative_rules: generic Snowfeather troop without personal anchors
